commands.name: npm_test_extracted
commands.stdout_tail:
evidence separates demo_seed, judge_demo, and human_trial logs on the data screen (4.2218ms)
✔ dashboard metrics expose concept error rate, reason distribution, repeated mistakes, and improvement (1.0977ms)
✔ dashboard improvement treats retried wrong answers as resolved evidence (1.7262ms)
✔ manual same-concept retry clears the previous wrong answer before dashboard refresh (0.6144ms)
✔ mastery scores expose concept understanding from retry evidence (0.8242ms)
✔ review schedule uses vendored ts-fsrs with a CodeFair MVP cap (0.4408ms)
✔ upstream ts-fsrs code is vendored and wired into review scheduling (4.9338ms)
✔ dashboard model exposes today's review concepts from due learning events (0.5815ms)
✔ review recommendations prioritize low mastery and recent wrong-answer concepts (0.9057ms)
✔ recommendation trace explains why the top concept was selected (0.5335ms)
✔ wrong answers recommend another same-concept problem before generating unverified templates (0.4348ms)
✔ template-generated similar problems are clearly excluded from vetted QA status (0.1037ms)
✔ AI similar problem generation normalizes Manus output and falls back safely (0.5175ms)
✔ generated problem quality gate flags missing review evidence without marking it vetted (0.3025ms)
✔ render-unsafe generated problems use fallback and keep the rejection reason visible (0.3746ms)
✔ AI diagnosis uses Manus adapter success and falls back safely on failure (1.1023ms)
✔ AI diagnosis falls back on empty or slow Manus responses (6.1207ms)
✔ Manus client uses official v2 task API with server-only key header (1.2288ms)
✔ Manus client can request a structured same-concept problem (0.8107ms)
✔ Manus client surfaces structured output failure for diagnosis tracing (0.7757ms)
✔ Manus client reads polling timeout configuration from server environment (0.2692ms)
✔ fallback diagnosis is deterministic enough for offline demo mode (0.1191ms)
✔ Manus credentials are kept out of browser-delivered files (6.6148ms)
✔ static server path guard blocks env and other dotfiles (0.4837ms)
✔ HTML evidence screen includes review concepts, mistake reason selection, and bounded AI wording (2.628ms)
✔ Geonho visual shell is absorbed without replacing the scoring system (2.2894ms)
✔ visible Korean UI hides raw English status labels and internal ids (3.1793ms)
✔ CodeFair submission package includes summary, architecture, 2-minute script, judge Q&A, and M5 evidence (0.8493ms)
✔ M4 submission docs are aligned to the latest M3 browser evidence (1.9578ms)
✔ Geonho human trial checklist turns Auto-Verified evidence into a student-use gate (1.1819ms)
✔ M5 handoff pack lets another agent run, configure, and add problems without overclaiming delivery (1.7181ms)
✔ M6 human trial validator blocks templates and accepts only recorded trial evidence (1472.1659ms)
✔ live Manus verification note records public-safe source evidence (0.7921ms)
ℹ tests 47
ℹ suites 0
ℹ pass 47
ℹ fail 0
ℹ cancelled 0
ℹ skipped 0
ℹ todo 0
ℹ duration_ms 5215.1029
